request_models.name: CalculatorRequest
request_models.purpose: Typed request model for the public calculator contract.

fields.name: InputSet
fields.notes: Synthetic selector for a named input shape.

fields.name: Provenance
fields.notes: Optional trace context for fixture and package provenance.

request_models.name: ArrowFileRequest
request_models.purpose: Typed request model for Arrow-file fallback execution.

fields.name: ArrowPath
fields.notes: Arrow IPC file that carries the request batch.

fields.name: OutputPath
fields.notes: Destination path for the response Arrow file.

response_models.name: CalculatorResponse
response_models.purpose: Typed response model for calculator results and binding diagnostics.

fields.name: Diagnostics
fields.notes: Structured diagnostics for transport and contract checks.

fields.name: Errors
fields.notes: Structured binding errors if execution fails.

fields.name: Provenance
fields.notes: Traceability for source, mode, and checksum chain.

response_models.name: BindingReadinessResponse
response_models.purpose: Typed status model for NuGet and fixture readiness.

public_calculator_contract.name: public-calculator-contract
public_calculator_contract.notes: The binding contract mirrors the public calculator request/response shape but does not embed calculation semantics.

invocation_modes.name: cli-fallback
invocation_modes.notes: Uses the public calculator CLI when the managed binding is unavailable or explicitly disabled.

invocation_modes.name: arrow-file-fallback
invocation_modes.notes: Uses Arrow IPC files for batch-oriented fallback and cross-process transport.

codes.message: Typed request or response model is not aligned to the public calculator contract.
Managed binding is unavailable; using CLI fallback instead.
Arrow-file fallback is being used for batch interchange.
Provenance chain is incomplete or checksum data is missing.
NuGet package readiness is not ready for release yet.

errors.description: Managed binding invocation failed before a typed response could be created.
CLI fallback could not be launched or returned an invalid payload.
Arrow-file fallback input or output did not match the declared interchange schema.
Provenance metadata is incomplete, unverifiable, or missing a checksum.
Fixture gate did not pass the synthetic-only or alignment checks.
NuGet package is not yet marked ready for release.

gates.name: synthetic-content-only
gates.reason: No production data, PHI, or implementation code is present.

gates.name: public-calculator-alignment
gates.reason: Typed request and response models are aligned to the public calculator contract shape.

gates.name: fallback-coverage
gates.reason: Managed, CLI, and Arrow-file fallback paths are declared explicitly.

gates.name: provenance-completeness
gates.reason: The contract includes source, checksum, and artifact-trace fields.

gates.name: nuget-readiness-gate
gates.reason: Packaging readiness is tracked separately from functional validation.

blockers: Managed implementation assembly is not part of this contract bundle.
nuget_readiness.notes: The contract records readiness metadata so the binding can graduate to NuGet without changing the surface contract.

examples.name: validation-pass
examples.description: Synthetic pass example for contract alignment, fallback coverage, and provenance completeness.

examples.name: validation-fail
examples.description: Synthetic fail example for missing provenance, misaligned models, or missing fallback coverage.

examples.name: diagnostics
examples.description: Synthetic diagnostics catalog for transport, provenance, fixture, and packaging problems.

examples.name: provenance
examples.description: Synthetic provenance manifest for the binding contract and example fixtures.

examples.name: errors
examples.description: Synthetic error catalog with stable binding error codes.

examples.name: fixture-gates
examples.description: Synthetic fixture gate manifest showing required validation gates.

examples.name: nuget-readiness
examples.description: Synthetic NuGet readiness status for the binding package.
